title.sub: SceneManager + Input + Assets + SoundManager + SaveData + I18n
title.prompt: Press Enter / A button to start
menu.title: MENU
menu.hint: Up/Down navigate, confirm to select, cancel to back out, mouse click also works
settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.hint: Up/Down: row    Left/Right: slider value    Enter: button    Esc: back
keybind.title: KEYBINDINGS
keybind.hint: Up/Down: row    Enter: rebind (REPLACE)    Backspace: ADD    Delete: remove last    Esc: back
keybind.capture_replace:
Press any input to BIND for "{action}"
(replaces existing)
keybind.capture_add: Press any input to ADD a binding for "{action}"
saveload.hint_save: Up/Down: row    Enter: save    X / Delete: delete    Esc: back
saveload.hint_load: Up/Down: row    Enter: load    X / Delete: delete    Esc: back
game.hint: WASD / Arrows / Stick to move, X / Gamepad X for score +1, Esc for Pause
pause.title: PAUSED
